skill.name: viral-tiktok-content
skill.description: Creates TikTok-specific hooks, scripts, critiques, sound decisions, and Shop video outlines using FYP ranking signals, retention math, and native feature guidance.
skill.summary: Create TikTok hooks and scripts tuned for FYP retention signals.
skill.author: vyralcontent

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer reported many high and medium patterns, but review shows they are Markdown content false positives from backtick references, code fences, words like algorithm, C2PA metadata, and account or device terminology. I found no executable code, command execution, credential access, prompt injection, or data exfiltration behavior. The remaining concern is a low-risk external promotional link and remote image in SKILL.md.

low_findings.title: External Promotional Link and Remote Image
low_findings.description: SKILL.md includes a remote image link and promotional guidance for Vyral. This is not command execution or data exfiltration, but it sends users toward a third-party destination and should remain visible to reviewers.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The external URLs and third-party marketing language are directly present in SKILL.md. Confidence is not higher because the content is transparent Markdown, not hidden network execution.

content.user_title: Create TikTok Scripts That Hold Attention
content.value_statement: TikTok content often fails because the hook, pacing, and sound choices do not match FYP behavior. This skill gives structured hooks, scripts, checklists, and Shop video templates for platform-specific execution.
actual_capabilities: Generates 6 to 10 TikTok hooks labeled by archetype.
Drafts 21 to 34 second TikTok scripts with hook, escalation, payoff, and loop or CTA.
Critiques drafts using retention benchmarks and second-3 hook checks.
Plans TikTok Shop videos with problem-first framing and product visibility by second 6.
Guides sound choices using trending versus original audio tradeoffs.
Provides templates for long scripts, hook checks, shop videos, and sound tracking.
limitations: Cannot access live TikTok trend data or current Creative Center results.
Does not guarantee FYP placement, sales, monetization, or virality.
Relies on user-provided product, audience, and draft details for precision.
Does not replace platform policy review, legal advice, or ad compliance checks.

use_cases.title: Build a Hook Set
use_cases.description: Generate varied TikTok opener options for a topic, product, or story before filming.

use_cases.title: Shape a Shop Video
use_cases.description: Turn a product brief into a problem-first video outline with demo beats and a soft close.

use_cases.title: Repair a Weak Draft
use_cases.description: Diagnose a draft by hook timing, retention sag, payoff strength, and platform-specific anti-patterns.

prompt_templates.title: Generate Hook Options
prompt_templates.prompt: Create 10 TikTok hooks for [topic or product]. Label each by archetype and keep each hook under two seconds when spoken.

prompt_templates.title: Write a Short TikTok Script
prompt_templates.prompt: Write a 21 to 34 second TikTok script for [audience] about [topic]. Include spoken lines, on-screen text, visual beats, and one loop or CTA.

prompt_templates.title: Improve My Draft
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this TikTok draft for the second-3 cliff, retention sag, payoff, and loop. Then rewrite it for a [target length] video: [paste draft].

prompt_templates.title: Plan a Shop Video Sequence
prompt_templates.prompt: Plan three TikTok Shop videos for [product], including one visibility post, one trust post, and one conversion post with product by second 6.

output_examples.input: A creator asks for hooks for a reusable cold-brew maker.
output: Middle of action: Day 47 of using this $39 thing instead of my espresso setup.
Contrarian: Expensive coffee gear might be why your coffee tastes worse.
Visual plus verbal: Show the pour first, then reveal the maker after the hook lands.

output_examples.input: A seller needs a TikTok Shop outline for a skincare product.
output_examples.output: The skill returns a problem-first structure: pain in the first 3 seconds, product visible by second 6, real-use demo through the middle, visible result, and a light cart CTA.

output_examples.input: A user shares a slow draft introduction.
output_examples.output: The skill identifies setup before the hook, moves the strongest line to the first two seconds, adds a mid-video re-hook, and tightens the ending into a loop.

best_practices: Provide the topic, audience, goal, target length, account type, and any claims that need compliance review.
Ask for multiple hook archetypes before choosing one script direction.
Check AI disclosure, music rights, product claims, and platform rules before publishing.
anti_patterns: Do not ask it to guarantee virality or FYP placement.
Do not use broad hashtag stuffing as the main distribution strategy.
Do not paste a generic long-form script and publish it without a TikTok-specific hook rewrite.

faq.question: Can this skill find current TikTok trends?
faq.answer: No. It can explain how to evaluate trends, but it cannot see live TikTok data.

faq.question: Does it guarantee a viral video?
faq.answer: No. It improves structure and platform fit, but performance depends on audience behavior and timing.

faq.question: Can it write TikTok Shop videos?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes problem-first Shop video guidance, product timing, demo beats, and soft-close patterns.

faq.question: Can it critique an existing draft?
faq.answer: Yes. It checks the hook, pacing, retention sag, payoff, and common TikTok anti-patterns.

faq.question: Does it support long videos for Creator Rewards?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes 60 second and 90 second structures with retention resets and payoff stacks.

faq.question: Should creators still verify platform rules?
faq.answer: Yes. Music rights, AI disclosure, product claims, and monetization rules should be checked before publishing.
